# Cache Files

This folder stores automatically generated cache files from the synonym enrichment modules. They are created on first run and reused on subsequent runs to avoid re-querying external APIs or re-parsing large files.

| File | Source | Generated by |
|---|---|---|
| `wikidata_cache.json` | Wikidata SPARQL API | `wikidata_enricher.py` |
| `dbpedia_cache.json` | DBpedia SPARQL API | `dbpedia_enricher.py` |
| `umls_cache.json` | MRCONSO.RRF (local) | `umls_enricher.py` |

To force a refresh, delete the relevant JSON file and re-run the pipeline.
